The object of the Bill is to replace the said Ordinance.” 
8. 
As already discussed above, Section 1(3)(a) of the Bonus Act makes 
the Bonus Act applicable to all the factories. The term ‘factory’ is 
defined under Section 2(17) of the Bonus Act as follows:
“(17) “factory” shall have the same meaning as in clause 
(m) of section 2 of the Factories Act, 1948;”
Clause (m) of Section 2 of the Factories Act, 1948 reads as follows:
“(m) “factory” means any premises including the precincts 
thereof—
(i) 
whereon ten or more workers are working, or were 
working on any day of the preceding twelve months, 
and in any part of which a manufacturing process is 
being carried on with the aid of power, or is ordinarily 
so carried on, or
(ii) 
whereon twenty or more workers are working, or 
were working on any day of the preceding twelve 
months, and in any part of which a manufacturing 
process is being carried on without the aid of power,
